choiceAnalysis:
• Choice A — $x=\frac{5by}{9}$: This would mean $\frac{1}{5b}=\frac{9 \cdot 5by/9}{y}=5b$, giving $\frac{1}{5b}=5b$, false in general. ✗
  • Choice B — $x=y-45b$: Substituting back gives $\frac{1}{5b}=\frac{9(y-45b)}{y}$, which is not a valid identity. ✗
  • Choice C — $x=\frac{y}{45b}$: Substituting: $\frac{9x}{y}=\frac{9 \cdot y/(45b)}{y}=\frac{9}{45b}=\frac{1}{5b}$. ✓
  • Choice D — $x=45by$: Substituting: $\frac{9 \cdot 45by}{y}=405b \neq \frac{1}{5b}$ in general. ✗
That confirms C is correct.
